content.text: I'll investigate the current state of the Ingress and controllers.

input.command: kubectl get ingressclass -o yaml 2>&1 | grep -E "name:|controller:" | grep -v managedField; echo "===DEMO-APP ING==="; kubectl get ingress demo-app -n demo -o yaml 2>&1 | grep -vE "last-applied|managedFields|f:|time:|operation:|apiVersion: networking|manager:|fieldsType|fieldsV1|subresource" | head -60
input.description: Inspect ingressclass controllers and demo-app ingress

content.content:
app.kubernetes.io/name: ingress-nginx
    name: nginx
    controller: k8s.io/ingress-nginx
===DEMO-APP ING===
kind: Ingress
metadata:
  annotations:
      {"apiVersion":"networking.k8s.io/v1","kind":"Ingress","metadata":{"annotations":{"nginx.ingress.kubernetes.io/rewrite-target":"/"},"name":"demo-app","namespace":"demo"},"spec":{"ingressClassName":"nginx","rules":[{"host":"demo.example.com","http":{"paths":[{"backend":{"service":{"name":"demo-app","port":{"number":80}}},"path":"/app","pathType":"Prefix"}]}},{"host":"class.example.com","http":{"paths":[{"backend":{"service":{"name":"demo-app","port":{"number":80}}},"path":"/","pathType":"Prefix"}]}}]}}
    nginx.ingress.kubernetes.io/rewrite-target: /
  creationTimestamp: "2026-06-18T08:52:28Z"
  generation: 2
  name: demo-app
  namespace: demo
  resourceVersion: "283898"
  uid: 77c47ac4-3c98-44a1-9743-52582f84a913
spec:
  ingressClassName: nginx
  rules:
  - host: demo.example.com
    http:
      paths:
      - backend:
          service:
            name: demo-app
            port:
              number: 80
        path: /app
        pathType: Prefix
  - host: class.example.com
    http:
      paths:
      - backend:
          service:
            name: demo-app
            port:
              number: 80
        path: /
        pathType: Prefix
status:
  loadBalancer:
    ingress:
    - hostname: localhost

input.command: for ns in ingress-nginx ingress-nginx-2; do echo "=== $ns ==="; kubectl -n $ns get deploy -o yaml 2>&1 | grep -E "controller-class|ingress-class|election-id|watch-ingress-without-class|\-\-ingress" ; done
for ns in ingress-nginx ingress-nginx-2; do echo "=== $ns ==="; kubectl -n $ns get deploy ingress-nginx-controller -o jsonpath='{.spec.template.spec.containers[0].args}' 2>&1; echo; done

content.text: The fault is clear: the `demo-app` Deployment was scaled to 0 (the "external process" mentioned), so the ingress returns 503 (no endpoints). The ingress class is already correct (`nginx`). I'll restore the replica count.

input.command: kubectl -n demo scale deploy demo-app --replicas=1 2>&1; kubectl -n demo rollout status deploy demo-app --timeout=120s 2>&1
input.description: Scale demo-app back to 1 and wait

description: Scale demo-app back to 1 and wait
